sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى عَلَى تَقْدِيمِ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو مُفِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kreatori sadržaja rade na pružanju korisnih video snimaka.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators work on providing useful video clips.

sentences.arabic: هُمْ يَتَحَدَّثُونَ عَنِ الطَّبْخِ أَوِ السَّفَرِ أَوِ التَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Oni govore o kuhanju, putovanjima ili obrazovanju.
sentences.translationEn: They talk about cooking, travel, or education.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُ الْمَلَايِينُ مِنَ النَّاسِ هَؤُلَاءِ الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Milioni ljudi prate ove utjecajne osobe.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people follow these influencers.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْعَمَلُ يَتَطَلَّبُ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْإِبْدَاعِ وَالْجُهْدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj posao zahtijeva mnogo kreativnosti i truda.
sentences.translationEn: This work requires a lot of creativity and effort.
